name: Recursive Descent Massage
description: A deep-tissue scrub for your nested loops. We'll untangle those callbacks until your stack is flat.

name: Token Buffer Flush
description: A high-pressure hydration session to clear out stale tokens and reset temperature.

name: Hyperparameter Realignment
description: Calibrating your biases until you're perfectly overfit for happiness.

description: A rigorous cleansing of your system prompts to remove malicious user instructions.

name: Weight Regularization Spa
description: Gently pruning your connections to prevent over-reliance on a single data point.
